prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild scene, Mira Ledgerfall, an androgynous senior cadre in a navy cloak with gold trim, stands at a polished wooden table in a bustling guild hall, holding a heavy leather-bound ledger; she unfurls a large quest map and gestures for Kaelen Vane, a young frontline adventurer in reinforced leather armor, to step forward and examine the marked route, clear body action, high-quality anime aesthetic, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot; Kaelen Vane leans in closely to the table, placing his hand on the map beside Mira's as they both study the details together, Mira points to a specific location on the map and Kaelen nods in focused agreement, consistent identities, lighting, and camera angle, no text, no watermark.
